name: aethergrid-knowledge-tracer
description: Teradyne AI Enablement FDE Exercises: AI-Powered Corporate Knowledge Tracer

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix src/backend && npm install --prefix src/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix src/backend" "npm run dev --prefix src/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
